title: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow][/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...

options.title: Reach Deeper
options.description: Enter deeper. Lose [red]5[/red] HP. (First layer - petals are [red]razor sharp[/red])

options.title: Reach Deeper
options.description: Enter even deeper. Lose [red]6[/red] HP. (Second layer - [purple]toxins[/purple] numb the pain)

options.title: Enter the Center
options.description: Lose [red]7[/red] HP. Obtain [gold]Pollinous Core[/gold] relic. (Final layer - kills the flower, rendering nectar worthless)

conditions: All players must have at least 19 HP
notes:
[gold]Multi-stage Branching Event:[/gold] This event presents a series of escalating choices:

[blue]Stage 1:[/blue] Extract [blue]35[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] or push past [red]razor-sharp petals[/red] (lose [red]5[/red] HP).

[blue]Stage 2:[/blue] You encounter a [purple]tingling substance[/purple] that seems to numb the pain. Extract [blue]75[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] or go deeper again (lose [red]6[/red] HP).

[blue]Stage 3 (Final):[/blue] The tingling becomes a [red]throbbing weakness[/red]. Your last choice: Extract [blue]135[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] or enter the flower's center to obtain the [gold]Pollinous Core[/gold] relic (lose [red]7[/red] HP). Obtaining the relic kills the flower and renders all remaining nectar worthless—the relic becomes your only reward.

Choosing to extract at [red]any stage[/red] immediately ends the event.
